description.name: Marina Sky Penthouse
description.headline: Full-floor penthouse with private rooftop terrace overlooking Dubai Marina
description.description: Occupying the entire 42nd floor of a landmark tower in Dubai Marina, this three-bedroom penthouse delivers an uncompromising luxury experience. Floor-to-ceiling glass on all sides frames panoramic views stretching from the Burj Al Arab to the Palm Jumeirah. The private rooftop terrace features a jacuzzi, a summer kitchen, and a sun deck. Concierge service and a dedicated parking bay are included.

reviews: The views are simply indescribable. Waking up to the Marina and Palm every morning never gets old.
Every detail is impeccable. The rooftop jacuzzi at night with the city lights is an experience you won't forget.
Stayed for a week. The concierge arranged everything seamlessly. Worth every dirham.

policies.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 30 days before check-in
policies.payment_schedule: 50% deposit on booking, remainder 30 days before arrival
